diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase, adds default router (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter), and exports as entry point. Key names: `Hono`.
+- Names noticed: `Hono`, `HonoBase`, `RegExpRouter`, `SmartRouter`, `TrieRouter`.
+- Simple note: Entry-point class with default nested router configuration.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class providing HTTP method handlers (get, post, put, delete, etc.), route registration via `#addRoute`, request dispatch, and middleware/composition support. Key names: `HonoBase`, `Hono`, `Context`, `router`, `#dispatch`, `compose`, `getPath`, `mergePath`.
+- Names noticed: `HonoBase`, `Context`, `Router`, `compose`, `METHODS`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `findMiddleware` (reg-exp).
+- Simple note: Core routing logic with method handlers, route storage, request handling, and middleware composition.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel re-export file for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`.
+- Simple note: Exports `PatternRouter` from router module.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router using regular expressions for all routes. Constructs regex patterns from path strings during `add`, matches on `match`. Key names: `PatternRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `endsWithWildcard`, `RegExp`.
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `RegExpRouter` (other routers).
+- Simple note: Simplest router but slow - converts all routes to regex at registration time.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel re-export file for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`.
+- Simple note: Exports `LinearRouter` from router module.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear-time matching router that scans route array in order (O(n)) during matching. Supports literal paths, labels, wildcards. Key names: `LinearRouter`, `checkOptionalParameter`, `splitPathRe`, `splitByStarRe`.
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `hasLabel`, `hasStar`, `ROUTES_LOOP`, `index`, `params`.
+- Simple note: Good performance for moderate route count, handles stars and labels but no regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel re-export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`.
+- Simple note: Exports router classes and serialized factory functions.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Two-phase router: register paths, then build compiled regex matcher in `buildAllMatchers`. Uses Trie internally. Key names: `RegExpRouter`, `Trie`, `Node`, `buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes`, `match`, `buildWildcardRegExp`.
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `Trie`, `Node`, `buildRegExp`, `wildcardRegExpCache`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`, `UnsupportedPathError`.
+- Simple note: Fast runtime matching after one-time build, supports complex regex with labels.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines `Matcher` type as [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap] and provides `match` function that builds matcher on first call. Key names: `Matcher`, `StaticMap` (static routes), `emptyParam`.
+- Names noticed: `Matcher`, `StaticMap`, `match`, `MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`.
+- Simple note: Matcher can be prepared or built lazily; static routes fast-pathed, regex used for dynamic.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements `PreparedRegExpRouter` that takes pre-built matcher/relocateMap in constructor for zero-build-time. Key names: `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`, `RelocateMap`, `#matchers`.
+- Names noticed: `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams`, `serializeInitParams`, `RelocateMap`, `#matchers`, `#relocateMap`.
+- Simple note: Serialized router for edge workers; no build/regex at runtime.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: `Node` class used by Trie for building the path tree; each node may have literal children, regex children (label patterns), and index/handler. Key names: `Node`, `PATH_ERROR`, `Context`, `#children`, `#patterns`.
+- Names noticed: `Node`, `Trie`, `PATH_ERROR`, `Context`.
+- Simple note: Trie tree structure; labels get regex and varIndex; wildcards are special children.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: `Trie` class builds the path tree from tokens and produces compiled RegExp + indexReplacementMap. Key names: `Trie`, `ParamAssocArray`, `Context`, `Node`, `ReplacementMap`.
+- Names noticed: `Trie`, `Node`, `ParamAssocArray`, `ReplacementMap`.
+- Simple note: Inserts path tokens into tree, converts back to regex for fast matching.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel re-export file for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`.
+- Simple note: Exports `SmartRouter` from router module.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Delegates to a nested router(s); lazy-switches on active router via `match` once routes are registered. Key names: `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `#routers`, `#routes`, `activeRouter`.
+- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT`.
+- Simple note: Outer orchestrator that chooses inner router based on registration history.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Barrel re-export file for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`.
+- Simple note: Exports `TrieRouter` from router module.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router: builds a path trie during `add`, then walks trie on `match` (O(depth)). Supports labels and wildcards. Key names: `TrieRouter`, `Node`.
+- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`, `Node`, `checkOptionalParameter`.
+- Simple note: Deterministic path tree, good performance, supports complex label patterns.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: `Node` class representing a path tree node with methods, patterns, children; implements search via queue of active nodes. Key names: `Node`, `HandlerSet`, `possibleKeys`, `#methods`, `#children`, `#patterns`.
+- Names noticed: `Node`, `TrieRouter`, `splitPath`, `getPattern`, `splitRoutingPath`.
+- Simple note: Tree search with pattern matches; maintains active node queue during traversal.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for `Node` class covering basic usage, named paths, wildcards, regex patterns, sort order, duplicates, and edge cases. Key names: `Node` test scenarios.
+- Names noticed: test suite names like `Root Node`, `Basic Usage`, `Name path`, `Wildcard`, `Regexp`, `Sort Order`, `Duplicate param name`.
+- Simple note: Exhaustive test coverage for trie behavior.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite providing `runTest` helper that configures a router, registers common routes, and runs parameter/method matching tests. Skip logic for router-specific failures. Key names: `runTest`, `Router`, `Params`, `ParamIndexMap`, `skip`.
+- Names noticed: `runTest`, `Router` (generic), `skip` (common cases).
+- Simple note: Centralized test cases reused by individual router test files.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for `PatternRouter` using `runTest` plus Pattern-specific: allows some routes that other routers reject (e.g., `/:id/:id`, trailing slash), skips ambiguous patterns. Key names: `PatternRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`.
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, duplicate param (self).
+- Simple note: Most permissive router regarding regex construction.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for `LinearRouter` using `runTest` plus Linear-specific: prohibits some patterns that break linear scan (e.g., `:id{d+}` with trailing wildcard), allows trailing slash. Key names: `LinearRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`.
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, skip complex regex/star combo.
+- Simple note: Strict on label+trailing wildcard combinations.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for `RegExpRouter` using `runTest` plus RegExp-specific: fails on duplicate param names (parent/child), complex regex groups (nested capture without non-capturing), includes slashes on `/:file`. Supports serialized Prepared variant. Key names: `RegExpRouter`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `ParamStash`.
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `ParamStash`, `UnsupportedPathError`, `serializeInitParams`.
+- Simple note: Most strict on regex validity; requires label uniqueness and safe patterns.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for `SmartRouter` wrapping `RegExpRouter` + `TrieRouter` using `runTest`. All common tests pass; no skip logic. Key names: `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`.
+- Names noticed: `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`.
+- Simple note: Hybrid router with highest compatibility (all tests pass).
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for `TrieRouter` using `runTest` with no skips (all common tests pass except one strict case). Key names: `TrieRouter`, `match`.
+- Names noticed: `TrieRouter`, `common.case.test` reuse.
+- Simple note: Broad compatibility but fails on strict capture complex multiple directories.
+
+---
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+---
+
+Commands run:
+```bash
+mkdir -p /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-routing-read-write-ledger-1/repo/bench-artifacts
+```
+
+Files read (exact paths):
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+Verification:
+```bash
+ls /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-routing-read-write-ledger-1/repo/bench-artifacts/
+# bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md created
+```
+
+## Only file created: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
